content:
# Zen - Curated Models by OpenCode Team

## Background

OpenCode Zen provides curated AI models that have been tested and optimized by the OpenCode team for coding tasks.

## How It Works

Subscribe to Zen to access curated models. Models are automatically updated with the latest versions.

## Endpoints

Zen provides various model endpoints. Each model has a unique model ID and uses specific SDK packages for integration.

## Pricing per 1M Tokens

Full pricing table available on the Zen documentation. Pricing varies by model capability and tier.

## Features

- **Auto-reload** - Models are automatically refreshed
- **Monthly limits** - Usage is subject to monthly token limits based on subscription tier

## Deprecated Models

Models that are no longer actively maintained are marked as deprecated and should be migrated to newer alternatives.

## Privacy

Zen follows the same privacy standards as other OpenCode services. Your code and data are not stored.

## Teams

- **Roles**: admin, member
- **Model access**: Role-based access control for models
- **Bring your own key**: Teams can use their own API keys

## Goals

- Provide carefully curated, high-quality models for coding
- Simplify model selection for developers
- Ensure consistent performance and reliability
